scripts.prisma:generate: npm run prisma:generate -w auth-service && npm run prisma:generate -w users-service && npm run prisma:generate -w cms-service
scripts.prisma:migrate: npm run prisma:migrate -w auth-service -- --name init_auth && npm run prisma:migrate -w users-service -- --name init_users && npm run prisma:migrate -w cms-service -- --name init_cms
scripts.prisma:seed: npm run prisma:seed -w auth-service && npm run prisma:seed -w users-service && npm run prisma:seed -w cms-service
scripts.setup:db: npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:migrate && npm run prisma:seed
scripts.dev:core: concurrently -k -n auth,users,cms,gateway,public,platform "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:users" "npm run dev:cms" "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:web-public" "npm run dev:web-platform"
